Interface IRasterStatistics

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control raster statistics.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("7E7E6103-FA34-11D1-8D22-0000F8780535")]
public interface IRasterStatistics

Properties

IgnoredValues

Array of doubles indicating the pixel values not included in the statistics calculation.

object IgnoredValues { get; set; }

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsValid

Indicates if statistics are fresh.

bool IsValid { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Maximum

Approximate largest value.

double Maximum { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Mean

Approximate average value.

double Mean { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Median

Divides pixel population approximately in halves.

double Median { get; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Minimum

Approximate smallest value.

double Minimum { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Mode

Approximate most popular pixel value.

double Mode { get; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

RasterBand

The RasterBand.

IRasterBand RasterBand { set; }

Property Value

IRasterBand

Examples

Sample Snippet

SkipFactorX

Number of horizontal pixels between samples for purposes of calculating statistics.

int SkipFactorX { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

SkipFactorY

Number of vertical pixels between samples for purposes of calculating statistics.

int SkipFactorY { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

StandardDeviation

Measures spread of pixel values about the mean.

double StandardDeviation { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

Recalculate()

Recalculate statistics based upon current skip factors and ignored values.
